description: Three cohorts x 200 Lob-verified mailing addresses = 600 first-wave mailers

waves.wave_1: First 200 mail-ready (lob_ready=true) per cohort — initial mailer
waves.wave_2: Overflow beyond 200 mail-ready in same cohort — second mailer batch
waves.pending: Cohort assigned but not yet mail-ready (no deliverable address)
